title: Inventory / Stock (Maal)
content:
Goods held for sale in godam/shelf.
Roman: godam ma maal, stock siddiyo, fatak maal=expired.
Perpetual sale: Dr COGS, Cr Inventory. Damage: Dr Loss, Cr Inventory.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
content:
COGS = Opening Stock + Purchases - Closing Stock.
Perpetual: Dr COGS, Cr Inventory at unit cost when goods sold.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Profit / Loss (नाफा / नोक्सान)
content:
Profit = Revenue - Expenses. Loss when expenses exceed revenue.
Roman: aaj kati nafa bho, noksan ma gayeko, break even pugena.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Advance Received (Agrim Rasid)
content:
Money before delivery — LIABILITY until fulfilled.
Roman: token diyeko, booking gareko, bayana diyeko.
Receive: Dr Cash, Cr Advance from Customer. On delivery: Dr Advance, Cr Sales.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Advance Paid to Supplier
content:
Paid before goods — CURRENT ASSET until received.
Roman: sahulai agadi paisa, booking ma paisa gayo.
Dr Advance to Supplier, Cr Cash. On receipt: Dr Purchase, Cr Advance.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Loan (ऋण / Rin)
content:
Borrowed money — principal=LIABILITY; interest=EXPENSE.
Roman: bank bata rin liyeko, kistii tirnu pareko, saapati.
Loan Rs 500000: Dr Bank, Cr Bank Loan. NOT income.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Interest (व्याज / Byaj)
content: Interest expense on borrowing; income on deposits. TDS may apply — verify IRD/CA.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Salary / Wages (तलब / ज्याला)
content:
Salary=monthly; wages=daily. Operating expense. TDS/SSF may apply — verify IRD/CA.
Roman: manchhe ko talab, kal ko jyaala.
Dr Salary Expense, Cr Cash/Bank.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Rent (भाडा / Bhaada)
content:
Rent for premises/equipment. TDS on rent — verify Finance Act/IRD.
Roman: bhaada tireko, pasal ko bhaada.
Dr Rent Expense, Cr Cash (with TDS Payable if applicable).
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Utilities (Bijuli/Paani/Telephone)
content:
NEA electricity, water, phone, internet — operating expenses.
Roman: batti bill tireko, NEA ko bill, wifi ko payment.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Depreciation (ह्रास / Hraas)
content:
Allocation of fixed asset cost over useful life — non-cash expense. Tax rates under Income Tax Act — verify CA/IRD.
Dr Depreciation Expense, Cr Accumulated Depreciation.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Fixed Assets (Sthir Sampatti)
content:
Long-term assets for operations — furniture, machinery, vehicles, computer. NOT for resale.
Roman: pasal ko furniture, AC kinareko, refrigerator kinareko (shop use).
Dr Fixed Asset, Cr Cash. NOT purchase/expense account.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)
